title: メジロ家のあの子たち～難しい選択～

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm working in my office alone one night after a
day of training with Mejiro McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Good evenin'! Coming through!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Sorry for barging in here so late.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It is understandable that you would be confused.
Allow me to fill you in on the particulars.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The three of them explain their sudden entrance.
Apparently, they were about to watch a movie,
but the dorm's television was broken.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So the conversation turned to them possibly
watching it in my office instead.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I apologize for suddenly springing this upon you.
Would you care to join us, perhaps?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My, that's good to hear. Well then, I'll attend to
the preparations.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Soon after, the four of us begin to watch the
movie.

text_block_list.name: The Three
text_block_list.text: Eek!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My goodness! Just as I thought they had escaped
from the monster, they're now locked in this
room!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yikes, they're cornered from every angle! They're
done for!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
They better get outta there and find somewhere
safe, stat!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Yes, I hold the same—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: But wait.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ryan?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Think about it. The room is closed off. The hero
and heroine are all alone.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
This can only mean one thing... This is their
moment!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
They should make the most of it and stay right
there together until the end!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Nah, not gonna work! That's just plain dangerous!
They totally need to get outta there. Right,
McQueen?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh, me? Um... What do you think of this, Trainer?
choice_data_list: They're in danger so they should find an escape.

They should stay there together and make
something happen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Yes, I see your point.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Palmer, I am in agreement with you. I too believe
they should try and escape.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Nice choice, McQueen! Knew you'd have the guts
to make a run for it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But now that I think about it... just how are they
gonna pull it off?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, obvious! They need to get into an open
stance! Or maybe they should go for a closed
stance and get a good back swing in?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
What are you... No one here understands your
golf jargon, you know!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The situation seems to have gone beyond Mejiro
McQueen's grasp.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
If that's how you feel, Trainer... then I will have to
agree with Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh, really? I'm happy to hear that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
So, McQueen, what do you think will happen
next?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Obviously, their heightened emotions will make
them fall for each other! Or maybe they'll start to
remember how important they are to each other?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I mean... they're in a closed room! Something has to happen, right? Riiight?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I can't... I can't think with you staring me down
like that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The situation seems to have gone beyond Mejiro
McQueen's grasp.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The movie progresses to its final act.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Noooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The monster is growing in size! Aaah, it's looking
this way!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I cannot take this any longer! We need rescue
efforts, rescue efforts! Mobilize the Mejiro
Defense Team! Dispose of this beast at once!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Haha! You are way too invested in the movie. At
least you're enjoying it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... too bad the Mejiro family doesn't actually
have a defense squad.
